package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerCachingPerRequestConfigCacheRebuild() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_caching_per_request_config_cache_rebuild"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Caching. Flag request-scoped caches rebuilt from config or environment on every call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
